match.userMessage:
Handheld camera tracks beside Scarlett as she walks steadily along the wooden promenade rail, body angled forward with hair lifting in the salt breeze. Surfers carve thin white lines across the blue water behind her. She glances back over her shoulder toward the ocean with a soft smile. She speaks the line with quiet reflection, gaze drifting off-frame. Gentle ocean waves roll in the distance while fabric flutters lightly against her frame and fine sand dust lifts in the coastal breeze.

[SCARLETT, soft reflective]: "Made for the water."

Ambient sounds: ocean waves washing shore, light wind through rail, distant surfer splashes. footsteps on wooden boards, fabric fluttering in breeze.
